overview: Complete showcase website for JADAV UNIFORM — a school and college uniform shop. Features a bold hero section, dual-category product catalog with filtering, individual product detail pages with inquiry forms, an About Us page, and a Contact page. Fully mobile-responsive in navy, white, and gold colors.
features: Hero section with brand name and tagline
School Uniforms & College Uniforms product catalog
Product detail pages with Inquire Now form
About Us page with shop story
Contact page with address, phone, email and inquiry form
Navy, white and gold color scheme throughout
